name: Chocolate Truffle Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup Semi sweet chocolate bits, melted
recipeInstructions:
1. Raspberry Sauce: In a food processor or blender, process 10 oz frozen red raspberries with 1 light syrup until smooth. Strain the mixture and stir in 3 tbsp whipping cream.
2. Cheesecake Directions:
a. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
b. Stir together chocolate wafer crumbs and melted margarine in a small bowl. Press onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
c. Bake for 10 minutes.
d. Beat cream cheese and sugar in a large mixing bowl at medium speed until well blended. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
e. Blend in melted semi-sweet chocolate bits and vanilla. Pour over the crust.
f. Bake for 45 minutes. Remove from the oven and let cool before removing the rim of the pan.
3. Serving:
Spoon creamy raspberry sauce onto each serving plate. Place a slice of cheesecake over the sauce and garnish as desired.
